name: Fireflies.ai GraphQL API
description: The Fireflies.ai API is a GraphQL-based interface that provides access to meeting transcripts, users, channels, AI-powered conversation threads (AskFred), analytics, audio/video uploads, and more. All operations are performed via a single POST endpoint at /graphql.
